rationale: No qualitative change near Romania this cycle — Iran deal uncertainty persists with mild energy price implications, Black Sea/Ukraine front unchanged.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps energy market uncertainty alive, with indirect effects on Romanian gas and electricity prices. No breakthrough this cycle.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Escalation in Lebanon adds instability to the broader Middle East picture, marginally relevant to Romania via energy market risk.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: new rules and Rome protests
top_events.summary: EU migration policy discussions continue; Romania as a transit and destination country has mild indirect interest, but no new binding decisions.
